scripts.deploy: npm run build && sst deploy --stage develop
scripts.local: npm run build --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/integration-discord && npm run local --workspace @lambda-batch-playground/batch-playground
scripts.lint: biome ci docs README.md package.json turbo.json tsconfig.base.json sst.config.ts .github apps/*/src apps/*/docs apps/*/package.json apps/*/tsconfig.json packages/integrations/*/src packages/integrations/*/docs packages/integrations/*/package.json packages/integrations/*/tsconfig.json packages/libs/docs packages/libs/package.json packages/libs/tsconfig.json && turbo run lint
scripts.format: biome format docs README.md package.json turbo.json tsconfig.base.json sst.config.ts .github apps/*/src apps/*/docs apps/*/package.json apps/*/tsconfig.json packages/integrations/*/src packages/integrations/*/docs packages/integrations/*/package.json packages/integrations/*/tsconfig.json packages/libs/docs packages/libs/package.json packages/libs/tsconfig.json
scripts.format:fix: biome format --write docs README.md package.json turbo.json tsconfig.base.json sst.config.ts .github apps/*/src apps/*/docs apps/*/package.json apps/*/tsconfig.json packages/integrations/*/src packages/integrations/*/docs packages/integrations/*/package.json packages/integrations/*/tsconfig.json packages/libs/docs packages/libs/package.json packages/libs/tsconfig.json
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
